ddls:
CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the document */,
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sponsor who filed the document */,
  "filed_date" TEXT /* Date the document was filed */,
  "last_floor_action" TEXT /* Last floor action taken on the document */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the document (e.g., Web Page PDF) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the document (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the document (e.g., bill, amendment, resolution) */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_sponsor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sponsor_id") REFERENCES sponsors ("sponsor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_format FOREIGN KEY ("format") REFERENCES formats ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sponsors" (
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sponsor */,
  "sponsor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sponsor */,
  "party" TEXT /* Party affiliation of the sponsor */,
  "district" TEXT /* District represented by the sponsor */,
  "committee" TEXT /* Committee affiliation of the sponsor */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Additional contact information for the sponsor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sponsor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action */,
  "action_name" TEXT /* Name of the action (e.g., Replaced by Engrossed Amendment) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was taken */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., floor action, committee action) */,
  "related_action_id" INTEGER /* ID of a related action (e.g., an amendment to an amendment) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the format (e.g., Web Page PDF) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the format */,
  "format_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Changes made in this version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Brief description of changes made in this version */,
  "previous_version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the previous version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "amendments" (
  "amendment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each amendment */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document being amended */,
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sponsor who filed the amendment */,
  "filed_date" TEXT /* Date the amendment was filed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the amendment */,
  "amendment_type" TEXT /* Type of amendment (e.g., friendly, unfriendly) */,
  "related_amendment_id" INTEGER /* ID of a related amendment (e.g., an amendment to an amendment) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("amendment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_amendments_sponsor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sponsor_id") REFERENCES sponsors ("sponsor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_amendments_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., lawmaker, legislative aide, public) */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of user (e.g., lawmaker, legislative aide, public) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department affiliation of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the document */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method of access (e.g., web, mobile app) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "committees" (
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each committee */,
  "committee_name" TEXT /* Name of the committee */,
  "committee_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the committee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("committee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "tag_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_tag_map" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id", "tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_map" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
